strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong testing/TDD background including Vitest-era frameworks, workshops, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Currently on a career gap since October 2025
Limited explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (robotic arms work ~2016-2018)

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin exposure

response.justification: The candidate brings deep full-stack experience with the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, a strong testing culture, and recent hands-on work with AI agents and MCP — directly relevant to internal automation tooling. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js experience and dated Kotlin/Java exposure, plus a current career gap, but the breadth of languages, architecture experience, and recent AI tooling work align well with the role's profile.
